name: A Dance to the Music of Time
original_name: A Dance to the Music of Time
overview: A Dance to the Music of Time is a four-part adaptation of Anthony Powell's 12-volume novel sequence that aired on Channel 4 in 1997. The series is a sharp, comic portrait of upper-class and bohemian England, spanning almost a century, from the early 1920s to modern times.

trailers.title: A Dance to the Music of Time
